2022-23 Cal State Bakersfield Roadrunners Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 11-22 (6-14, 8th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Rod Barnes

PS/G: 60.5 (360th of 363)

PA/G: 64.7 (39th of 363)

SRS: -8.34 (277th of 363)

SOS: -1.47 (175th of 363)

ORtg: 93.9 (351st of 363)

DRtg: 100.4 (135th of 363)
